below_target_resolution_note: Brief target was 1080x1350. Source generated at 1k = 880x1168 (memory project_higgsfield_dtc_ads_quirks flagged 2k as risky for dtc-ads — generic gpt_image_2 likely supports 2k safely). If a variant is validated, re-generate the winner at --resolution 2k (≈1760x2336) and crop to 4:5 for hero-grade fidelity. Current files are validation-grade.

base_prompt_principles.subject: single cream-colored ceramic mug, steaming blue-violet matcha latte, foam rosette latte art, 3 steam wisps
base_prompt_principles.color_lock: iris violet (NOT pink, NOT rose, NOT magenta)
base_prompt_principles.surface: soft cream linen with natural wrinkles
base_prompt_principles.background: blurred warm cream and champagne, shallow DOF, subtle green leaf accent
base_prompt_principles.lighting: golden hour window light from left, Portra 400 film grain, 3500K, soft shadows

A.delta: Mug center-composed at 60% of frame, 3/4 angle slightly above eye level, foam rosette prominent and central
A.visual_notes: Smooth clean cream ceramic mug. Lavender/dusty purple liquid — slightly desaturated vs brand target. Classic 3/4 editorial pose. Simple linen + small green leaf upper-left. Three clean steam wisps.

B.delta: Near-overhead 60° angle from vertical, foam rosette fully exposed from above, mug fills 55% of frame, slightly off-center
B.visual_notes: Speckled stoneware mug (artisanal). STRONGEST iris-violet saturation of the three — closest to brand #6B4E9E. Top-down rosette dramatic and fully readable. Golden hour warmth, foliage upper-left in background. Most 'want-to-drink' composition.

C.delta: Mug in upper third at 50% of frame, 3/4 angle, generous cream linen in foreground with natural folds, wider editorial lifestyle crop
C.visual_notes: Speckled stoneware mug. Lighter lavender liquid — slightly less saturated than B. Rich draped linen in foreground (most fabric texture of the three). Plant foliage upper-right is more present than brief's 'subtle leaf accent' but stays in background. Most lifestyle/storytelling feel of the three.

reasons: Color: B has the strongest iris-violet saturation, closest to brand #6B4E9E. A and C are slightly dusty/lavender. On a hero meant to communicate 'The Violet Matcha' to cold US traffic, color signal must read instantly.
Drink desire / CRO: Overhead latte-art rosette is the modern Pinterest-tested hero pose for hot drinks. Strongest 'I want this in my hand' trigger of the three.
Editorial signal: Rhode / Moon Juice / Maison Matcha all use overhead for product heroes. Reads more contemporary than the 3/4 of A.
Real estate efficiency: Hero-split LEFT has limited width — overhead fills the slot with product, not environment.
Mood: Golden hour + speckled stoneware = artisanal premium without going rustic-cluttered.
claude_recommendation.honorable_mention: Variant A is the cleanest brand-perfection match (smooth ceramic, minimalist Rhode-Skin feel). Pick A only if Charles wants polished-minimalist over color-saturation/drink-desire.
claude_recommendation.do_not_pick: C — plant foliage is too present for a hero slot meant to break the 'wellness = privation' objection. The drink should dominate, not the environment.

next_step: STOP. Await Charles validation: 'VALIDATED photo 1 variant [A/B/C]'. On validation, optionally re-gen at 2k for hero-grade resolution (1760x2200 cropped), then integrate into sections/u2-hero-split.liquid replacing the SVG mug placeholder on side LEFT. Push to dev theme uburn-us-premium-v2 #186066567487. Live theme #185967575359 UNTOUCHED.
blocking_rules_respected: One photo at a time, no integration before Charles validation
